
## SOP details {visibility="hidden"}

### operations requiring same origin 


* accessing webpage you loaded in iframe, pop-up window, etc.
* accessing webpage loading you in iframe, pop-up window, etc.
* sending <i>certain kinds of</i> requests 

   * most notably XMLHTTPRequest --- ‘‘AJAX’’



### operations not requiring same origin  {.smaller}


* [loading images, stylesheets (CSS), video, audio]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only}
* [linking to websites]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}
* [loading scripts]{.fragment fragment-index=7 .custom .myem-only} 

   * but not getting syntax errors

* [accessing with ‘‘permission’’ of other website]{.fragment fragment-index=4 .custom .myem-only}
* [submitting forms to other webpages]{.fragment fragment-index=5 .custom .myem-only}
* [requesting/displaying other webpages \sout{(but not reading contents)}]{.fragment fragment-index=6 .custom .myem-only}
